name: Fuze Wash Z350
comment: The FUZE WASH Z350™ is a single source par moving head luminaire featuring a 350W Quad Color RGBW COB LED, 6° to 46° motorized zoom, pan and tilt, RGBW color mixing, variable dimming curve and strobe effects, DMX and RDM (remote device management) protocol support, DMX and Locking Power Cable in/out connections, LCD menu display with 7 button control panel, multiple unit power linking, flicker free operation for TV and FILM, and a multi-voltage universal auto switching power supply (110-240v).

capabilities.comment: Counter Clockwise Movement fast to slow

gwSpecs.description: The FUZE WASH Z350™ is a single source par moving head luminaire featuring a 350W Quad Color RGBW COB LED, 6° to 46° motorized zoom, pan and tilt, RGBW color mixing, variable dimming curve and strobe effects, DMX and RDM (remote device management) protocol support, DMX and Locking Power Cable in/out connections, LCD menu display with 7 button control panel, multiple unit power linking, flicker free operation for TV and FILM, and a multi-voltage universal auto switching power supply (110-240v).
